response.justification: The candidate has extensive experience in software development and leadership, with a strong background in open-source technologies and IT architecture. They have worked on various projects, demonstrating their technical skills and ability to learn new technologies.
strengths: Extensive experience in software development and leadership
Strong background in open-source technologies and IT architecture
Proficiency in multiple programming languages and technologies
concerns: German language proficiency is basic, not meeting the C1 requirement
No direct experience in UML modeling and design
